title: I Taught Claude Code to Play Tetris... It Broke the World Record

extracted.hook: Did you guys know that I'm actually a Tetris world champion? No, I'm just kidding.
transitions: Okay, so here is the first game that it built me.
Okay, so game number two is a classic.
All right, guys. I think I cracked it.
So it's going to start up the game server and then it's going to launch the checkers bot.
extracted.cta: if you want to play around with it, go tell it to figure out how to install the Playright CLI, and it will just do it for you.
curiosity_gaps: "I'm going to go ahead and call it a day. We're going to close out of those sessions and they definitely crushed the 80,000 mark."
"All right, so I am gold and the AI is red. I haven't played checkers in I don't even know how long. So I have no strategy going into this, but we're just going to go ahead and get started here."

time_references: "I haven't played checkers in I don't even know how long. So I have no strategy going into this, but we're just going to go ahead and get started here."

extracted.vulnerability: "I'm clearly having way too much fun with cloud code."

accelerates: discussing the block game and bot attempts
showing the Tetris game play and scores
slows: explaining the process of building games for the AI to play
